# Flagstaff Insurance

## About
Flagstaff Insurance (flagstaffinsurance.com) is an independent insurance agency serving Flagstaff, Coconino County, and all of Northern Arizona. A division of Contractors Choice Agency, NPN #8608479, licensed in all 50 states since 2005. As an independent agency, we represent 12+ carriers and shop multiple options to find each client the best coverage at the best rate.

## Services
- Auto Insurance: Compare rates from 12+ carriers for Flagstaff drivers. Coverage for mountain roads, elk collision zones, winter driving, and uninsured motorist protection.
- Home Insurance: Wildfire/WUI coverage, snow load protection, replacement cost policies for Flagstaff homeowners. WUI zone specialists.
- Business Insurance: BOP, General Liability, Workers Comp, Professional Liability, Commercial Auto. Serving NAU-adjacent businesses, Route 66 tourism, hospitality, and professional services.
- Renters Insurance: Same-day policies for NAU students and Flagstaff renters. Personal property, liability, and additional living expenses.
- Life Insurance: Term and permanent life for Flagstaff families. Final expense for Northern Arizona seniors.
- Umbrella Insurance: $1M–$5M excess liability over home and auto. Critical for homeowners with pools, teen drivers, and rental property owners.

## Service Area
Primary: Flagstaff, AZ (Coconino County)
Extended: Sedona, Williams, Page, Winslow, Holbrook, Prescott, Camp Verde, Kingman, Cottonwood, Show Low, Pinetop-Lakeside
Statewide: Licensed throughout Arizona and all 50 states

## Local Context
- Flagstaff elevation: 6,900 feet; 100+ inches annual snowfall
- WUI (wildland-urban interface) designation: wildfire exposure in ponderosa pine forest
- Major wildlife collision zones: US-89 (elk), I-40 corridor
- Northern Arizona University: 28,000+ students, large renter population
- Arizona uninsured driver rate: ~11–12% of registered vehicles

## Target Audience
Flagstaff homeowners, NAU students, Northern Arizona families, local small businesses, Sedona vacation rental owners, Route 66 business operators, White Mountains cabin owners, retirement-age residents of Northern Arizona.

## Why Independent Agency
Independent agents represent multiple carriers (not one captive company), compare rates across the market, work as the client's advocate during claims, and can find coverage when a carrier limits its exposure in WUI zones or for non-standard risks.

- A.M. Best A+ rated carriers

- Wildfire / WUI insurance specialists
